title: Dark Experience
description: A fresh Vanilla-Based Dark Mode, not 100% a Vanilla darkified GUI
body:
Dark Experience is born to give Users a Vanilla-Based darkified GUI and at the same time something cool to see, because other packs only go to change brightness to everything, but with this pack you are going to have Dark UI Buttons and Transparent Inventories, cool right? here is the title screen down here ⬇️

![Title Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S9AIWfQs/images/dd46adbce73e6da13b295f3be96d08a52ddba1fe.png)
I know, there are some Mods right here...... obviously are not included with this pack, but you can simply ignore them on the screen because they don't replace any element of the Vanilla Minecraft Title Screen (the only thing missing is the java edition logo, it didn't got removed in the pack), also i'm doing that just to show that some mods are not going to have issues

**[MORE EXAMPLES ON GALLERY](https://modrinth.com/project/dark-experience/gallery)**

Hope you find it nice to use

Also, i would raccomend to use this pack alongside [YellowText](https://modrinth.com/mod/yellowtext), [Console Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/console-tooltip) and [Tooltips Stylized](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooltips-stylized) to make everything better
